target_audience: B2B Decision Makers, Tech Leads, Job Applicants

headings.usage: Use for all H1-H6. Tight tracking (-0.02em).

body.usage: Use for paragraphs, labels, and UI text.

primary.name: Precision Mint
primary.usage: Primary buttons, active states, key highlights. NEVER as a full background for text sections.

secondary.name: Deep Charcoal
secondary.usage: Footer background, primary text color, heavy borders.

background.usage: Main page backgrounds. Use 'subtle' for alternating sections.

rules: Avoid centering text unless it's a short tagline.
Use asymmetry in hero sections (text left, image right/offset).
Use 1px borders to define grid areas instead of shadows.

buttons.style: Sharp or slightly rounded (rounded-md). High contrast.
buttons.primary: bg-[#00C853] text-white hover:bg-[#009624] hover:scale-105 transition-all duration-200 shadow-lg shadow-mint/20
buttons.secondary: border border-[#1A1A1A] text-[#1A1A1A] hover:bg-[#1A1A1A] hover:text-white transition-all duration-200

cards.style: Flat, 1px border, no shadow (or very subtle hover shadow).

inputs.style: Flat, bottom border only OR sharp rectangle.

visual_enhancers.texture: Subtle noise overlay on solid backgrounds to reduce digital flatness.
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Use sparingly for sticky headers: backdrop-blur-md bg-white/80 border-b border-gray-100.
visual_enhancers.gradients: NO PURPLE GRADIENTS. Use subtle Mint-to-White fades only for decorative blobs.

instructions_to_main_agent: REBRANDING: The company name is 'Precision Labs'. Update all text.
THEME UPDATE: Replace all Orange/White themes in PUBLIC pages with Mint/White.
DO NOT TOUCH: Admin dashboard (Tokyo Night) and Employee dashboard (Orange).
FONT INSTALLATION: Add Space Grotesk and Manrope via Google Fonts import in index.css.
NAVBAR: Make it sticky, glassmorphism (white/80), with Mint Green active states.
FOOTER: Dark theme (Deep Charcoal #1A1A1A) with White text. Large typography.
HERO SECTION: Asymmetrical. Text left (H1: 'Precision in Every Pixel'), Image right (Hero Main).
ANIMATIONS: Use 'framer-motion' for subtle fade-ins (y: 20, opacity: 0). NO heavy bounces.
DATA-TESTID: Add data-testid to all buttons and links (e.g., 'home-hero-cta').
PAGES TO REDESIGN: Home, Unternehmen, Dienstleistungen, Karriere, Kontakt, Impressum, Datenschutz.

do_not_use: Centered text blocks for long content
Shadows that look dirty (use crisp low-opacity shadows)
universal_guidelines.accessibility: Ensure contrast ratio of Mint Green text on White is sufficient. If not, use a darker shade of green for text (#009624).
